_comment: Ground truth is a SUBSTRING a correct passage must contain — never a chunk id and never chunk
text. Re-chunking renumbers and rewrites every chunk, so ground truth tied to chunks evaporates
on exactly the change it exists to evaluate (D1). A substring survives any chunking strategy.
Matching is case-insensitive with whitespace collapsed, so a cut across a line break still counts.
tags: 'conflict' = the corpus deliberately contradicts itself (the superseded-policy case; the
expected value is the CURRENT policy, so this question measures whether retrieval surfaces the
governing document). 'crosslingual' = asked in Indonesian against an Indonesian document,
because invariant 5 makes that a supported case.

questions.q: How long does standard shipping take?
When do I qualify for free shipping?
What is the flat shipping fee?
How long does delivery outside the mainland take?
What does a tracking code look like?
How quickly must I report a damaged item?
How long is the hardware warranty?
Are batteries covered by the warranty?
What are your support hours?
What number do I call to reach support?
Can I get help through social media?
questions.expects: do not offer support through social media

questions.q: How many days do I have to request a refund?
Is there a restocking fee on returns?
How do I start a refund request?
Which items cannot be refunded?
How long do I have to return unopened goods?
Can I change the delivery address after ordering?
Do you offer a student discount?
Is there a minimum order value?
Can I place an order over the phone?
Which payment methods do you accept?
questions.expects: Card, iDEAL, SEPA direct debit, and PayPal

questions.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
Do business customers get payment terms?
When are invoices issued?
questions.expects: first working day of the month

questions.q: What format is an invoice reference?
What interest is charged on late payment?
How is VAT handled for business customers?
How long do I have to dispute an invoice?
questions.expects: within 60 days of the invoice date

questions.q: Do I need a purchase order number?
questions.expects: do not require a purchase order

questions.q: Berapa lama pengiriman ke Indonesia?

Where did Rina Halim study?
What did Rina build at Kirana Payments?
How far did Rina reduce unmatched transactions?
What did Rina do at Trellis Logistics?
What is the minimum password length?
Do you support two-factor authentication by SMS?
When does a session expire?
Do you store full card numbers?
How long are invoices retained after account deletion?
How quickly are customers told about a data breach?
Do you pay a bug bounty?
questions.expects: do not operate a paid bug bounty
